name: phone_tool
description: Phone tool for SMS messaging, voice calls, and contact management via Twilio. Send texts, make calls, check message/call history, manage contacts, block spam numbers, and screen unknown callers. Use send_sms to text someone, make_call to call them, manage_contacts to add/block/list contacts, and screen_number to check if a caller is known or spam.

to.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567). Required for send_sms and make_call.

message.description: Message content: text body for send_sms (max 1600 chars), or spoken message for make_call.

voice.description: TTS voice for make_call (default: 'Polly.Matthew'). Options include Polly.Matthew, Polly.Joanna, Polly.Amy, etc.

webhook_url.description: Optional webhook URL for dynamic call handling (make_call). If set, the webhook provides TwiML instructions instead of a static message.

phone_number.description: Phone number for contact management, screening, or filtering history.

limit.description: Number of results to return for check_messages/check_calls (default: 10).

relationship.description: Relationship to the contact, e.g., 'wife', 'friend', 'coworker' (for manage_contacts add).

notes.description: Additional notes about the contact (for manage_contacts add).

is_favorite.description: Mark contact as a favorite/priority (for manage_contacts add). Favorites always get through call screening.

reason.description: Reason for blocking a number (for manage_contacts block).

favorites_only.description: Only list favorite contacts (for manage_contacts list).
